message:
test(readme): cover remaining Rolling methods (fd90.282 / br-fpaih)

Extends readme_window_operations_compiles_and_runs to cover the 8
remaining Series Rolling methods (after fd90.199 covered 10):

- first, last, prod (additional reductions)
- skew, kurt (window moments)
- agg(&["sum", "mean"]) — string-dispatch multi-fn
- corr(&other_series) — window Pearson correlation against a same-
  length Series
- cov(&other_series) — window covariance

Built a 100-element companion Series for corr/cov. All 18 Series
Rolling methods are now exercised.

Verified: 36 integration tests + 7 lib tests + 2 doctests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
